'''zafudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oarweed|oarweed]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oarweed|oarweed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zafudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæfidith|zæfidith]] || [[word:zæfidij|zæfidij]] || [[word:zæfidish|zæfidish]] || [[word:zæfidi|zæfidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zafufuduth|zafufuduth]] || [[word:zafufuduj|zafufuduj]] || [[word:zafufudush|zafufudush]] || [[word:zafufudu|zafufudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zafuduth|zafuduth]] || [[word:zafuduj|zafuduj]] || [[word:zafudush|zafudush]] || [[word:zafudu|zafudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zafufduth|zafufduth]] || [[word:zafufduj|zafufduj]] || [[word:zafufdush|zafufdush]] || [[word:zafufduf|zafufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zafuduthu|zafuduthu]] || [[word:zafuduju|zafuduju]] || [[word:zafudushu|zafudushu]] || [[word:zafuduku|zafuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zafuduth|zafuduth]] || [[word:zafuduj|zafuduj]] || [[word:zafudush|zafudush]] || [[word:zafudu|zafudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zafuduthul|zafuduthul]] || [[word:zafudujul|zafudujul]] || [[word:zafudushul|zafudushul]] || [[word:zafudukul|zafudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zafuduthuthu|zafuduthuthu]] || [[word:zafudujuju|zafudujuju]] || [[word:zafudushushu|zafudushushu]] || [[word:zafuduku|zafuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zafuduthun|zafuduthun]] || [[word:zafudujun|zafudujun]] || [[word:zafudushun|zafudushun]] || [[word:zafudukun|zafudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zafuduthuoro|zafuduthuoro]] || [[word:zafudujuoro|zafudujuoro]] || [[word:zafudushuoro|zafudushuoro]] || [[word:zafudukuoro|zafudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
